The '''TIE-wing''' was a type of Rebel ship.<ref>{{RebuildTheGalaxy|Part Four}} </ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Appearing only in the new timeline introduced by the non-canon ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy]]'', the TIE-wing has a main body like a canon [[X-wing]]'s and wings like a canon [[TIE fighter]]'s.<ref>{{LEGOWebCite|url=en-us/product/tie-fighter-x-wing-mash-up-75393|text=LEGO® ''Star Wars''™ TIE Fighter & X-Wing Mash-Up}}</ref> TIE-wings resemble [[X-TIE Fighter]]s from Legends, but ''Rebuild the Galaxy'' implies that TIE-wings, unlike X-TIEs, are a standard design in the new timeline rather than [[Ugly/Legends|Uglies]] made from salvaged parts.
